name: gate-priority-registry-outranks-public-env
description: A single push that fails BOTH gadget gates: it references an export absent from every registered package (`useTurnstile` under `@acme/turnstile`) AND a registered wrapper whose `requires` is unsatisfied (`useMapboxMap` under `@acme/mapbox`, requiring `GGUI_PUBLIC_APP_MAPBOX_TOKEN` while `App.publicEnv` is empty). SPEC §7.7.3 pins the order: the registry gate runs FIRST so the operator gets the right diagnostic when both fail — an author who referenced an unknown export needs the registration miss, not a downstream env complaint. The composed gate MUST reject with `gadget_not_registered`.
